description: Revert card effect translations back to English per user requirement 'Las cartas siguen en ingles'. All other UI tweaks (tooltip icons, arrow shift, toast centering, shadows, coin icon) remain.
steps: CHANGE 1 - In src/components/MainMenu.tsx: Import HonorIcon and CoinIcon from './Icons'. Added icons before honor and income numbers in clan tooltips.
CHANGE 2 - In src/types/game.ts: Reverted ALL effect field values in SPRING_CARDS, SUMMER_CARDS, and AUTUMN_CARDS arrays back to original English.
CHANGE 3 - In src/App.css: Changed .politics-phase-tooltip-tea::after{left:25%} to left:calc(25% - 6px).
CHANGE 4 - Changed .rule-violation-toast to position:absolute centered in map-container, and moved the JSX inside the map-container div in GameBoard.tsx.
CHANGE 5 - In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx: Replaced all 5 occurrences of drop-shadow with stronger double shadow.
CHANGE 6 - In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx: Replaced t('seasonCardsModal.playerCoins') with CoinIcon + number display.
acceptance_criteria: npx vite build completes with 0 errors - PASSED
MainMenu.tsx clan tooltips show HonorIcon before honor number and CoinIcon before income number - VERIFIED
All SPRING_CARDS, SUMMER_CARDS, AUTUMN_CARDS effect strings in game.ts are in English - VERIFIED
The CSS rule for .politics-phase-tooltip-tea::after uses left:calc(25% - 6px) - VERIFIED
The rule-violation-toast is positioned centered within the map-container element - VERIFIED
RegionDetailModal ClanShield drop-shadow is stronger (0.9 opacity, double shadow) - VERIFIED
SeasonCardsModal player indicator shows CoinIcon instead of 'Monedas:' text - VERIFIED
findings: Reverted card effect translations from Spanish back to English. Used git checkout 832c7ac -- src/types/game.ts to restore the original file. Build passes successfully.
